item.title: Know your spots
item.description:
Similar solution to different environments from similar, but still distinct evolutionary branches. Cats coloration and patters are excellent camoflauge
Tigers look orange to humans because we are trichromats, but to deer and boars the same coat appears green since ungulates are dichromats. This visual difference allows the tiger’s orange and black stripes to blend into the jungle, giving it effective camouflage while stalking prey.
item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: I Stole This Dump So You Don't Have To. Friday Random MEME DUMP to help you finish work #842
item.description:
1. DAD GOT THE BEST MOVES YOO
2. JUST EXCELLENT WINE
3. European homies will instantly understand why he went for a header instead of trying to catch it with hands
4
5. LEGIT ANGRY BIRD (Sound on for the scream you didn't expect)
6. This is how big wind turbines actually are (human for scale)
7. hah that NPC ragdoll fall
8. BRING IT BAAACK NOWWW!
9. Introverts pretending to go out and have fun with other people
10. I feel there is an easier way of doing this
11
12. Yeah, what the heck is wrong with these people!
13. BAMBOOZELEED
14
15. It's never to late to be creative. What are you passionate about? Please share in the comments! For me it's game dev and I'm currently working on silly psychological horror game with my brother! I basically learned Unreal Engine from scratch just so I can make games like we played when we were kids. If you like to help us please wishlist the game on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment P.S. 1 Have a great weekend! Don't forget to hydrate and be mindful of negative thoughts! P.S. 2 We are also making a stand against AI in art and coding, so we won't be using any of this slop during development of the game!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: GovBrief Today #469
item.description: A federal judge stopped the Justice Department from making a list of every trans kid treated at Rhode Island Hospital and their parents. Eight federal judges have now blocked these subpoenas nationwide. The judge wrote that the administration "publicly characterized gender-affirming care for minors as abuse, directed the DOJ to bring its practice to an end, and celebrated when hospitals curtailed such programs as a result of this subpoena campaign." What could they possibly want with that list? Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to demand Congress shut the subpoena campaign down. I've emailed 7,412 stories over 469 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss pictures, data, and easy-click links on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260514-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/ratcliffe-cuba [2] https://go.govbrief.today/us-china-iran [3] https://go.govbrief.today/house-war-vote [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may14 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/poland-troops [6] https://go.govbrief.today/yale-medical [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-stocks [8] https://go.govbrief.today/mife-continuation [9] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-law-blocked [10] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-warehouse-plan [11] https://go.govbrief.today/ga-center-suit [12] https://go.govbrief.today/border-chief-quits [13] https://go.govbrief.today/hawaii-corp [14] https://go.govbrief.today/edwards-ethics [15] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-shutdown [16] https://go.govbrief.today/patel-snorkeling [17] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-golf-remake [18] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-profit-airport [19] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-stocks [20] https://go.govbrief.today/arch-work [21] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-hosp-trans Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Thankfully We Don't Have That Sort of Problem Here...
item.description:
Sauce: https://creators.yahoo.com/lifestyle/story/instagram-bot-purge-2026-millions-of-followers-vanish-as-celebs-and-creators-are-hit-hard-230919317.html
Not a fan of Meta or Zuck's megalomania but *maybe* more Execs might realise that quality is better than quantity...I won't hold my breath. To give a sense of the size and scope, Kylie Jenner lost 15million followers in only a few hours. lol
item.dc:creator: spittleteets

item.title: Ebony wood handle shaping from start to finish.
item.description:
Most of the basic shaping is done on the belt grinder and with the dremel.
It then gets refined by hand.
Thank you for checking me out. I am a one man knife making operation, so any like or comment is appreciated. If you like this kind of stuff and would like to see more I have a YouTube channel where I post full length build videos https://youtube.com/@helixknives
item.dc:creator: Helixknives

item.title: In China, many unemployed young men become delivery drivers, while young, jobless women turn to live streaming. The drivers spend some of their earnings on virtual gifts for the streamers, who then use the money to order food and cosmetics from them. A vi
item.description: In China, youth unemployment (around 17% for 16-24 year olds) is driving many towards delivery work and live streaming. Virtual gifts from delivery drivers to streamers circulate money within this platform economy, a cycle observed and discussed for several years. The phenomenon is real
item.dc:creator: kayzersosie

item.title: Friday Funky Fantasy Fiesta, ok its rpg but I couldn't let the alliteration go to waste

item.title: Blackfoot People
item.description: For over a millennia, the Blackfoot People lived along side the American Bison until both were forcibly displaced over a century ago. Bison were hunted to near extinction by the U.S. government as a method to starve and control Plains Tribes like the Blackfoot who were being forced off their lands and onto reservations. Bring Them Home follows a small group of Blackfoot who are working to right these historic wrongs by returning wild American Bison to their lands – an act that would heal people, re-enliven traditional culture and bring economic opportunity to their community.
item.dc:creator: LastHippie

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1689 (hopecore)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. This was bread made by a fellow imgurian, but my notes are on the dead phone. Please comment if this was your bread, it looks delicious.
My new sword is awesome. Slowly working on making a scabbard for it from scratch.
Yeah this tracks.
I haven't decided yet what my new sword is named. I'm either thinking Raven-Feeder or "Sword [but in Mycenean Greek]"
It's *a* secret reason, but yeah, California (and to a lesser extent, Arizona) want to beat Iran out their near monopoly on Pistachios. I hate this timeline.
Few things smell more delicious than a good light roast coffee from Ethiopia or Rwanda for me.
I serve the people I love.
Needs some more birds in that list of items there.
My favorite bookstore in Prescott LOVES The Pippin when I bring him in and demand to know he's okay if I don't bring him. Actually, they do this in my local grocery store too, come to think of it.
One of my coworkers keeps raving about a comedy night sketch I did FIVE YEARS AGO at an open mic comedy night. I guess it really made an impression. (The gist of it was "why autism is perfect for being a tour guide, and here's the difference between all the local towns in the Verde Valley")
It really is wack.
Remembering this for... oh hell for Pippin I guess.
I think Çatalhüyuk would have been a good stopping point. Seems to have been before power was grasped by the tyrants, and before taxes, and definitely after fire and ceramic.
It's called a weather app, Duh
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [bites] "Glory Pippin" (We may need to stop watching so many Klingon episodes for a while.)
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Gotta justify those data centers
item.dc:creator: CafeNervosa
